title: Gooey Venezuelan Cheese Quesadilla
description: A soft, yeasty cheese quesadilla with a spicy sriracha kick, perfect for a date-night dinner.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: use Queso Blanco or mozzarella for best melting

ingredients.name: egg
ingredients.notes: whisked with yeast to create airy cheese mixture

instructions: Whisk the egg, yeast, garlic powder, paprika, and a splash of water until frothy.
Fold in the shredded cheese until the mixture is smooth and slightly airy.
Stir in sriracha sauce and half of the chopped cilantro to coat the cheese.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Brush one side of each tortilla lightly with melted butter.
Place a buttered side down, spoon the cheese mixture onto half of the tortilla, then top with the other tortilla, butter side up.
Cook until the bottom is golden and the cheese starts to bubble, about 2 to 3 minutes.
Flip carefully and cook the second side until golden and the cheese is fully gooey, about 2 to 3 minutes; serve hot.
